title: Project
description: A project is a high-level Google Cloud entity. It is a container for ACLs, APIs, App Engine Apps, VMs, and other Google Cloud Platform resources. Projects are the base-level organizing entity and are required to use service-level resources.

name.description: The unique resource name of the project in the form projects/{project_number}. Output only.

parent.description: The resource name of the parent in the form folders/{folder_id} or organizations/{organization_id}. Required when creating a project.

projectId.description: The unique, user-assigned identifier of the project. It must be 6 to 30 lowercase ASCII letters, digits, or hyphens. It must start with a letter and cannot end with a hyphen. Project IDs are immutable and cannot be reused once assigned.

state.description: The project lifecycle state. Output only.

displayName.description: A user-assigned display name for the project. This field is optional and has a maximum length of 30 characters. Display names are used for identification purposes and do not need to be unique.

createTime.description: Timestamp of when the project was created. Output only. Uses RFC 3339 format.

updateTime.description: Timestamp of when the project was last modified. Output only. Uses RFC 3339 format.

deleteTime.description: Timestamp of when the delete request was sent. Only present when the project is in DELETE_REQUESTED state. Output only.

etag.description: A checksum computed by the server based on the current value of the project resource. Used for optimistic concurrency control.

labels.description: User-defined labels associated with the project. Label keys must be between 1 and 63 characters, and label values must be between 0 and 63 characters. Both keys and values can contain lowercase letters, numeric characters, underscores, and dashes. A maximum of 256 labels can be associated with a project.
